title: Musical Gravity Field
description: Scatter of 30,470 scrobbled tracks against BPM and a second musical axis (key, rhythm regularity, loudness, dynamic complexity). Colored by mood/energy/mode, sized by play count. Hover for track, click legend to isolate.
license_notes: Vanilla HTML/JS, no runtime deps. Pre-computed scatter_data.json derived from the day-002 music-charts enrichment pipeline (Spotify + ListenBrainz + MusicBrainz + AcousticBrainz, all CC0 or personal data). BPM and feature values come from AcousticBrainz (CC0) via Essentia.
